violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service, ice disposed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Chicken and salsa, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Cooked chicken prepared the day prior was observed with a temperature of 46 degrees in a covered plastic container greater than 4 inches deep and observed with condensation on cover. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
Pans of garnish/sauce were observed in direct contact with ready-to-eat food below. Pans removed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC stated staff are being sent for training. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC supplied. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The hand-washing sink at the bar was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, upstairs ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Birria, consommé, and borrego observed with date marks exceeding 7 days. Staff disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Staff labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings and nesting material in the dry storage unit and areas of the basement. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
Containers of foods were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in and dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

A pan of cut onions was observed in direct contact with the food below in the prep unit. Staff relocated the onions. An open container of pork was observed in the chest freezer, PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Single use containers are being re-used to store other foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The following were not in good repair: -chest freezer -prep unit gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -large ice machine -table top under grill -reach-in freezer -door tracks to True refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris:-floors behind and under equipment-ledge at basement stairs-stairway railings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils knives and ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. Knifes were cleaned during inspection. Ice machine was taken out of service during inspection. Staff started cleaning ice machine during inspection. Ice machine must be washed and sanitized prior to use. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

Some prepared foods in the walk-in cooler (cooked chicken, rice, pork, beans) were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: 1. Wall by fryer 2. Floor under equipment at cookline 3. Floor near grease trap The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
